reason: The CDP hierarchy definition in the LaTeX (line 1580) contains a mathematical error: Tr_{A_N}(W_{A_1 B_1 ... A_{N-1} B_{N-1}}) is nonsensical because the operator W_{A_1 B_1 ... A_{N-1} B_{N-1}} does not have an A_N subsystem (it was eliminated in the first trace condition). The correct second-level condition should trace over B_{N-1}, not A_N. Additionally, line 1584 writes 'Tr_{A_1 or B_1}(...)' which is imprecise -- the final condition should be stated unambiguously.
